meta.title: Immunological Analysis of the EDTA-soluble Antigens of Clostridium difficile and Related Species

abstractHtml: SUMMARY: Antigens were extracted with EDTA from 32 strains representing 10 species of Clostridium. When these antigens were examined by an enzyme-linked immunosorbent assay, marked cross-reactions were observed between C. difficile, C. sordellii and C. bifermentans. The cross-reactive antigen, visualized by crossed immunoelectrophoresis, was carbohydrate.
affiliationsHtml: • Department of Bacteriology, University of Edinburgh Medical School, Teviot Place, Edinburgh EH8 9AG
